article.title: Uber | SSE | L5-A | Compensation
article.content:
Total YOE - 7 years
Current TC - 36L Base + 4L Variable pay + 35L RSU/year
Current Company - Fintech US Based

Had other compeiting offers from Adobe, Confluent, Docusign, Atlassian, Cohesity

Uber SSE -

    Base - 75.78 excluding pf 
    PF - 4.68L
    Variable Pay - 14.6 - eligible to earn 2x
    RSU - 150k 4 years

    Total - 1.26cr

    Other Benifits - 

    60k wellness
    Uber credits - 4300/month
    health check program apollo 
    Cellphone program - new - 50$/month

    Paternity - 4 months

    Work from anywhere - 1 month

    relocation benefit - 2L


[Interview Experience](https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6628212/uber-sse-bangalore-l5-a-by-anonymous_use-0h6x/)

Please upvote if helpful

[Adobe Offer](https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6647167/adobe-cs2-compensation-by-anonymous_user-dq6g/)
[Docusign Offer](https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6647197/docusign-sse-compensation-by-anonymous_u-7gf2/)
[Confluent Offer](https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6647205/confluent-sse-2-compensation-by-anonymou-vnvj/)
[Cohesity Offer](https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/6647215/cohesity-mts4-compensation-by-anonymous_-f5h9/)

post.content: Amazing offers. Looks like you prepared really well.\nA post on your preparation strategy will be helpful to many. \nRegarding offer if I was in ur position I would choose Uber!
Hi, congratulations on your offers, can we connect on linkedIn,\nhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/rishav-sharma-a28794185/
Congratulations on your offer! \uD83C\uDF89 I\u2019d love to connect with you on LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/ankitkesar
Hi, can we connect on LinkedIn (link in profile). Would love to get some preparation tips.
Congrats on these offers.\nCan we connect on LinkedIn? Would love to discuss your preparation strategy.\nhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/archisman-sahoo-b7861646/
Which company have you decided to join ?
Hey can we please connect on LinkedIn \nhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/sainikhil-palukuri
can we connect over the linkedin please ? you can find my link in profile.
Did you negotiate it using other competitive offer?\nAlso what is the timeline of other offers?
How was the interview experience? What is your prep strategy since you seem to be nailing bunch of interviews, can you please share?
